_README: The HN proof-dependency DAG. Nodes = lemmas/results/conjectures/targets; edges = depends_on/specializes (load-bearing) or motivates/constrains/refutes/would_prove (annotation). control_buildable lists controls on which a node's argument is ALSO valid (empty = genuinely Euclidean). Edit this file, then run build_db.py to rebuild and re-audit. Keep it in sync with LEARNINGS.md and PUBLICATIONS.md.

controls.name: Q2
controls.note: rational plane unit-distance graph is bipartite (Woodall 1973)

controls.name: Linf
controls.note: L^infty unit-distance graph on R^2 has chi=4 exactly (Chilakamarri)

controls.name: R1
controls.note: the line has chi=2 trivially; blind to the rotation group O(2)

nodes.title: chi(R^2) >= 6 (the goal)
nodes.note: Program thesis: most likely terminal answer is chi=6 via a finite UDG (L54 backward-from-2050).

nodes.title: chi(R^2) >= 5 (de Grey 2018)
nodes.note: 1581-vertex UDG, k=4 UNSAT; verified by Heule.

nodes.title: chi(R^2) <= 7 (Isbell hexagonal coloring)
nodes.note: Upper bound; carries no lower-bound claim, so out of firewall scope.

nodes.title: de Grey 1581-vtx UDG is k=4 UNSAT
nodes.note: Independently reconfirmed in-repo via symmetry-broken portfolio (18.1 min).

nodes.title: Symmetry-broken self-certification of the chi>=5 lineage
nodes.note: M4(C5) k=6, P510 k=4, de Grey 1585 k=4 all UNSAT with optional DRAT; whole chi>=5 program self-certifiable on one workstation.

nodes.title: Abstract flexible color-clamp exists
nodes.note: Split a vertex w of a K4-free 6-critical graph into non-adjacent s~A, t~B forced different in every 5-coloring; SAT-verified 48-vtx triangle-free witness. Contracting s=t gives chi>=6.

nodes.title: Theorem R: exact realizability criterion for the clamp
nodes.note: The clamp realizes IFF H-w realizes with neighbor-sets A,B each on a radius-1 circle with DISTINCT centers. Reduces W3 to cocircularity.

nodes.title: W3: the clamp is unit-distance realizable in R^2 (THE missing object)
nodes.note: All difficulty of the chi>=6 program localizes here. Decidable (Tarski) but computationally walled beyond ~14 vtx (Groebner).

nodes.title: Forcing-sterility of the realizable lineage
nodes.note: All ~2.29M non-adjacent pairs across the 12 known chi-5 UDGs are FREE; all forcing is adjacency-local. The missing object cannot come from the known lineage.

nodes.title: K_{2,3}-free codegree ceiling excludes manufactured hosts
nodes.note: UDG-realizability forces K_{2,3}-freeness (two unit circles meet in <=2 points). Genuinely Euclidean: FAILS under L^infty, so control_buildable is empty.

nodes.title: Single-vertex-port chains confined to the primitive monoid
nodes.note: S_k color symmetry pins single-vertex-port relations to {0, I, J-I, J}; no color-shifter relations. Forces the clamp question into route (i) forced-same [dead] or route (ii) wide imprimitive interface.

nodes.title: Wide (>=2) imprimitive boundary interface
nodes.note: The only live combinatorial route: a width>=2 boundary whose coloring transfer matrix is imprimitive.

nodes.title: A new chi-5 UDG outside the P510 lineage
nodes.note: Built on a different principle (random rotation-closed rings, Cayley graphs of rotation subgroups) and carrying imprimitive structure. The most-leveraged next move.

nodes.title: chi_m(R^2) >= 5 (Falconer)
nodes.note: Measurable chromatic number. claims_bound is NULL by design: chi_m bounds do NOT load-bear ordinary-chi targets (see bridge_chim_chi).

nodes.title: IE-LP + IEC self-certifies chi_m >= 5
nodes.note: Self-certified m1 <= 0.2469 < 1/4 at machine precision; reproduces Ambrus 2023.

nodes.title: Order-2 measurable SDP at X_23 is FEASIBLE => route closed
nodes.note: Matrix-free order-2 (IEC up to subset size 4) does not even certify chi_m>=5, so by monotonicity cannot reach chi_m>=6. The order-2 measurable route is closed.

nodes.title: chi_m >= 6 via order-2 Lasserre on X_23
nodes.note: Refuted by order2_closed.

nodes.title: chi <= chi_m; chi_m>=6 does NOT imply chi>=6
nodes.note: The K1 circularity guard in narrative form: measurable lower bounds only transfer to ordinary chi via a separate transfer principle, never automatically. No load-bearing edge runs from a chi_m node to chi_r2_ge6.

nodes.title: Noncommutative SE(2) spectral bound for chi_m >= 6
nodes.note: Bessel-realized irreps of the motion group beyond the O(2)-averaged abelian shadow; smallest computable instance unknown.

nodes.title: Fractional / Lovasz-theta spectral bounds plateau
nodes.note: chi_f and theta-type operator bounds have not crossed the classical line at runnable scale.

nodes.title: Borel chromatic chi_B route via rotation-group ergodicity
nodes.note: Dark horse: the right question may be chi_B, not chi. Euclidean content must enter via irrational rotations / unique ergodicity, NOT norm-blind Steinhaus.

nodes.title: chi(R^2) depends on the choice axioms (Shelah-Soifer)
nodes.note: Under ZF+DC without full AC, chi(R^2) can differ from its ZFC value.

nodes.title: KILL: norm-blind Borel / Steinhaus lower bound
nodes.note: Would over-prove chi>=7 where L^infty has chi=4. Listed as control_buildable[Linf]; if ever re-wired as load-bearing for a chi>=5/6 target, the firewall fires.

nodes.title: KILL: combinatorial forcing that lifts naively to Q^2
nodes.note: Any forcing argument that would also prove chi(Q^2)>=3. Euclidean content must enter through topology/density/rigidity of R.

nodes.title: KILL: RG leading-eigenvalue as a forcing diagnostic
nodes.note: lambda_1 of the transfer matrix is coloring ENTROPY, the opposite of forcing; the right diagnostic is imprimitivity. Wrong but not control-blind.

nodes.title: KILL: DOF / over-determination counting for realizability
nodes.note: Invalidated by P510 at +1487 over-determination, degree 36, yet realizable.

nodes.title: KILL: polygonal map-type 6-coloring of the plane
nodes.note: Collides with Voronov: map-type colorings of the plane need 7 colors. A non-map 6-coloring (if chi=6) must be non-polygonal.

edges.note: the chi>=6 certificate is the contracted clamp

REFUTED: would over-prove on L^infty; annotation only, never load-bearing
REFUTED: would over-prove on Q^2; annotation only
dead forcing diagnostic
dead realizability heuristic
a chi=6 coloring, if it exists, must be non-map-type
